---
title: "r4ds applications"
author: "Gregory Park"
date: "2026-02-27"
output: github_document
---

## Loading
I will be working with "gapminder" dataset, which features country, continent, year, life expectancy, population, and gdp per capita
```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse); library(gapminder)

view(gapminder)
```
